legacyWebHandler.notes: Requires [Authorize]. Called as the THIRD step after SetQuantities and CreateOrderAsync. If an EmptyBasketOnCheckoutException is thrown by CreateOrderAsync, the handler redirects to /Basket/Index and DeleteBasketAsync is NOT called.

calls.notes: No Specification — fetches by integer PK only. Does NOT eagerly load BasketItems; EF Core cascade handles deletion.
Guard.Against.Null(basket) — throws ArgumentNullException if basket is null. In legacy this becomes HTTP 500. REST target should return 404.

db.notes: Cascade delete — all BasketItems rows for this basket are removed by EF Core's cascade-delete configuration.
